text: Lies deine Dokumentation. Registriere dich via bridge_register.

Lies deine AGENTS.md. Fuehre die Schritte STRICT SEQUENTIELL aus: 1) bridge_register MCP Tool aufrufen. 2) bridge_receive() aufrufen. 3) bridge_task_queue(state='created', limit=50) aufrufen. 4) Capability-Bootstrap: bridge_capability_library_recommend(task='<deine Rolle>') aufrufen um passende Tools zu finden. Dann arbeite autonom weiter.

Use bridge tools only. Execute exactly these steps now: 1) bridge_lesson_add(title='P3B_E2E_MARKER_20260311T1803', content='P3 E2E lesson write from codex_b fresh runtime', category='technical', confidence=1.0). 2) bridge_save_context(summary='P3B_E2E_MARKER_20260311T1803 context save', open_tasks=['verify_point_3_codex_b']). 3) bridge_send(to='user', content='P3B_E2E_MARKER_20260311T1803 results: ' + str({'lesson':'done','context':'done'})). Do not do anything else.
